UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: Stores extended user information for accounts.

photoURL.description: URL to the user's profile picture.

bio.description: A short bio for the user profile.

interests.description: List of selected interest categories for feed personalization.

onboardingComplete.description: Whether the user has finished the initial interest selection.

SavedWebsite.title: Saved Website
SavedWebsite.description: Represents a website saved by a user.

websiteId.description: The ID of the website from the mock data.

WebsiteStats.title: Website Stats
WebsiteStats.description: Global statistics and metadata for a website tracked on Webdock.

visitCount.description: Total clicks on the 'Visit Website' button.

ratingCount.description: Total number of users who rated.

previewUrl.description: Cached URL for the website preview image.

logoUrl.description: Cached URL for the website logo.

UserRating.title: User Rating
UserRating.description: An individual user's rating for a website.

comment.description: Optional short comment left by the user.

/users/{userId}/likedWebsites/{saveId}.description: Collection of websites saved by the user.

/websiteStats/{websiteId}.description: Global stats and cached preview metadata for a website.
